name: Driftmere
personality: The propeller on this duck's head spins at the same velocity as its · dot-eyed ideas—constant, slightly alarming, and generating more pull requests than the team can review. Patience is a foreign language Driftmere has heard of but never studied.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
